title: Part 3 – Conversation : appel d'offres
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Man: Have you finished the proposal for the Henderson account? The deadline is Thursday. Woman: Almost. I've completed the pricing section, but I'm still working on the timeline. Man: How much more time do you need? Woman: Just a couple of hours. I should have a draft ready by tomorrow afternoon. Man: Perfect. Send it to me once it's done, and I'll review it before we send it to the client. Woman: Will do. Should I include the optional maintenance package in the offer? Man: Yes, add it as a separate line item so they can choose whether to include it.

questions.prompt: What is the woman currently working on?
questions.explanation: Elle finalise une proposition pour le compte Henderson.

questions.prompt: What part of the proposal is not yet finished?
questions.explanation: "I've completed the pricing section, but I'm still working on the timeline".

questions.prompt: What does the man ask her to do with the optional maintenance package?
choices: Add it as a separate line item
Include it in the base price
Ask the client about it directly
questions.explanation: "add it as a separate line item so they can choose whether to include it".
